top_signals.title: BOJ Deputy Chief Underlines Proper Policy as Key for Bond Yields
top_signals.summary: Bank of Japan Deputy Governor Ryozo Himino highlighted the importance of appropriate policy adjustments to keep the faith of market participants amid a recent selloff in government debt.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: China Coking Coal Prices Extend Gains After Shanxi Mine Disaster
top_signals.summary: Chinese coking coal futures pushed higher for a second session as investors watched for a broader government crackdown on the sector after a deadly accident at a mine in Shanxi province.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Yuan May Hit Five Per Dollar on Carry-Trade Exit, Macquarie Says
top_signals.summary: China’s onshore currency may strengthen to as much as five yuan per dollar if local firms unwind a massive buildup of greenback holdings, triggering a sharp reversal in capital flows, according to Macquarie Group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Prize draw businesses have better luck than the average punter
top_signals.summary: Lack of regulation has helped draw operators to thrive

top_signals.title: Boosting retirement savings has a less-appreciated benefit
top_signals.summary: Saving more money has a dual benefit that often goes unnoticed, according to financial advisors.
